summary: The diff modifies three files: frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts (described in file summaries), and frontend-file-summaries.txt/project_state.json. REQ-77 (Navbar rewrite) and REQ-78 (useIsCallerAdmin query improvements) appear to be implemented based on evidence. REQ-79 (useActor.ts useEffect for query invalidation on identity change) is not visible in the diff — useActor.ts is not among the modified files.

missing_requirements.requirement: In frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, add or verify a useEffect that watches the identity object and calls queryClient.invalidateQueries() whenever identity changes from null to non-null, so all queries (including isCallerAdmin) are immediately re-fetched after login.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows only 3 modified files: Navbar.tsx, frontend-file-summaries.txt, and project_state.json. frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts is not listed as modified, so the required useEffect for query invalidation on identity change was not added.
